title: poa pumila
intro: Poa pumila, also known as Blue Fescue Grass, is a perennial grass native to the mountains of the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Poa pumila include its ability to support respiratory health, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Poa pumila can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
